nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Carthamus Tinctorius Flower/Vitis Vinifera Fruit/(Camellia Sinensis/Diospyros Kaki/Zanthoxylum Schinifolium) Leaf/Polygonum Cuspidatum Root/Castanea Crenata Shell/Coffea Arabica Seed Water
chemicalDescription: Carthamus Tinctorius (Safflower) Flower/Vitis Vinifera (Grape) Fruit/(Camellia Sinensis/Diospyros Kaki/Zanthoxylum Schinifolium) Leaf/Polygonum Cuspidatum Root/Castanea Crenata Shell/Coffea Arabica (Coffee) Seed Water is the aqueous solution of the steam distillates obtained from the flowers of Carthamus tinctorius, the fruit of Vitis vinifera, the leaves of Camellia sinensis, Diospyros kaki and Zanthoxylum schinifolium, the roots of Polygonum cuspidatum, the shells of Castanea crenata and the seeds of Coffea arabica. The accepted scientific name for Polygonum cuspidatumt is Fallopia japonica.
inciName: CARTHAMUS TINCTORIUS FLOWER/VITIS VINIFERA FRUIT/(CAMELLIA SINENSIS/DIOSPYROS KAKI/ZANTHOXYLUM SCHINIFOLIUM) LEAF/POLYGONUM CUSPIDATUM ROOT/CASTANEA CRENATA SHELL/COFFEA ARABICA SEED WATER
